title: elaeocarpus dewildei
intro: Elaeocarpus dewildei, also known as the Dewilde's tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Elaeocarpaceae. The plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Elaeocarpus dewildei include its potential to alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. Elaeocarpus dewildei can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are made by infusing the plant's leaves and stems in hot water or a solvent.
